title: cissampelopsis volubilis
intro: Cissampelopsis volubilis, also known as Chinese ivy balm, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cissampelopsis volubilis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
